card.name: Advance
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Human creature token. (You start the game with a tactic deck of one copy each of Advance, Besiege, Provision, Retreat, and Scout. If Advance would be put into your graveyard, shuffle it into your tactic deck instead.)

card.name: Retreat
card.text: Return target permanent you control to its owner's hand. (You start the game with a tactic deck of one copy each of Advance, Besiege, Provision, Retreat, and Scout. If Retreat would be put into your graveyard, shuffle it into your tactic deck instead.)

card.name: Besiege
card.text: Tap target creature. (You start the game with a tactic deck of one copy each of Advance, Besiege, Provision, Retreat, and Scout. If Besiege would be put into your graveyard, shuffle it into your tactic deck instead.)

card.name: Scout
card.text: Scry 2. (You start the game with a tactic deck of one copy each of Advance, Besiege, Provision, Retreat, and Scout. If Scout would be put into your graveyard, shuffle it into your tactic deck instead.)

card.name: Provision
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. (You start the game with a tactic deck of one copy each of Advance, Besiege, Provision, Retreat, and Scout. If Provision would be put into your graveyard, shuffle it into your tactic deck instead.)

card.name: Airdrop Medic
card.text: Flying, lifelink

card.name: Gifted Unicorn
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, target opponent may draw a card. If they do, draw a card.

card.name: Bloom Company Defector
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control a Faerie, this creature gains first strike and vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Pontifica's Scout
card.text: When this creature enters, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Mulberry Hall Clothier
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Shock and Sexton Patrol
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. Strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Exclusive Entourage
card.text: When this creature enters, put two +1/+1 counters on another target Human you control.

card.name: Sibling of Exploration
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Tactic spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Glider Ace
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, if you control a creature with a +1/+1 counter on it, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Lay Siege
card.text: This spell deals damage to target creature equal to the number of creatures you control. Strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Pacifism
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block

card.name: Air Support
card.text: Strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.) Until end of turn, target creature gets +1/+1 for each Tactic card in your hand and gains flying.

card.name: Requiter's Locomotive
card.text: Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Pave Over
card.text: Destroy target enchantment or tapped creature.

card.name: Standard-Issue Musket
card.text: When this Equipment enters, attach it to target creature you control. Equip {3} Equipped creature gets +2/+2. {1}, Discard this card, return a land you control to its owner's hand: Create a tapped Plains token.

card.name: Exuberant Skywright
card.text: Flying Whenever you strategize, scry 1.

card.name: Eager Field Marshal
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, if you've cast two or more spells this turn, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Wry Glamermage
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, create a 2/2 blue Illusion creature token with flying.

card.name: Foxtown Forger
card.text: Vigilance This creature can't be blocked if you've cast two or more spells this turn.

card.name: Distillery Engineers
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Eluthiel Reliquary
card.text: Flying, prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Fallowpeak Crab
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast for each card you own with bloom in exile or in your graveyard. Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Drownedmen Sailor
card.text: Defender {T}: Add {C}. You can't spend this mana to cast creature spells.

card.name: Marlene's Deception
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If they pay, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Miasmic Immersion
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.) Enchanted creature loses all abilities and has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Reflect
card.text: Draw a card. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Contentious Supporter
card.text: When this creature enters, draw three cards, then discard two cards. {1}, Discard this card, return a land you control to its owner's hand: Create a tapped Island token.

card.name: Call the Tempest
card.text: Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of them. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Improbable Current
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-0 until end of turn. If this spell was cast from exile, return that creature to its owner's hand. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Counter-Intelligence
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell. • Draw a card, then strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Foxes' Underground Diehard
card.text: When this creature enters, each opponent loses 1 life, then strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: One Eye's Sharpshooter
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{B}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Destroy target creature that was dealt damage this turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Apothecary Flunkie
card.text: When this creature dies, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Cantankerous General
card.text: Whenever another Human you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Rotting Revolutionary
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1}{B}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: It gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Mine Lurker
card.text: As long as you control a Human, this creature has deathtouch. As long as you control a Faerie, this creature has lifelink.

card.name: Rooftop Runner
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {B}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: It gets +1/+0 and gains flying until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Alynerada's Spawn
card.text: Flying This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if an opponent lost life this turn. {1}, Discard this card, return a land you control to its owner's hand: Create a tapped Swamp token.

card.name: Weaponself Assassination
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Human. This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a Faerie. Exile target creature.

card.name: Executioner's Spores
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less. • Create a tapped 2/2 green Fungus creature token.

card.name: Ichor Blockade
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature. If you've cast another spell this turn, instead that player sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures they control

card.name: Clivinius' Takedown
card.text: Target creature gets -8/-8 until end of turn.

card.name: Rescue Mission
card.text: Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. Strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Preacher of St. Frances
card.text: When this creature enters, you may pay {B} and 1 life. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Desperate Stand
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains "When this creature dies, return it to its owner's hand. If this creature is a Human, instead return it to the battlefield under its owner's control."

card.name: Vermix Hawker
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1}{R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Ruby's Loyalist
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Collier Saboteur
card.text: Trample {1}{R}, Discard this card: Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Hearth Spirit
card.text: Whenever you attack, target attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Catrest Elder
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Create a tapped 1/1 red Cat creature token with prowess. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, the token gets +1/+1 until end of turn)

card.name: Avant Guardsman
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever this creature attacks, the next noncreature spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Myriad's Firebrand
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Progeny Festival
card.text: Create three 1/1 red Cat creature tokens with prowess. {1}, Discard this card, return a land you control to its owner's hand: Create a tapped Mountain token.

card.name: Jollity Dancer
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: November's Fury
card.text: This spell deals 4 damage to target creature. Put a zeal counter on up to one target Faerie.

card.name: Righteous Tide
card.text: This spell deals 3 damage to target creature. If an opponent lost life this turn, this spell deals 6 damage to that creature instead.

card.name: Lightning Claws
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Scalding Geyser
card.text: This spell deals 1 damage to any target. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Thrill of Possibility
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Edgeshine's Daring
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Visiting Gadabout
card.text: When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Creatures you control with +1/+1 counters on them have ward {2}.

card.name: Margrave Honour Guard
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color among Humans you control.

card.name: Scholar of Forms
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {3}{G}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Put three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Mushroom Vintner
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {3}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Wayward Romantic
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Rooftop Gardener
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Create a tapped Forest token.

card.name: Tourist-Snapper
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Tairis Seer
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Scry 2. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Foxes' Underground Heel
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Target creature blocks this creature this turn if able.

card.name: True-Form Amalgam
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. {1}, Discard this card, return a land you control to its owner's hand: Create a tapped Forest token.

card.name: Vivian's Finisher
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control if you control a Human and a Faerie. That creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Cut Loose
card.text: You gain 1 life. Put a zeal counter on up to one target Faerie. Bloom. (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Flowing Strike
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Simpler Times
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Swell's Pilgrimage
card.text: Mill three cards, then put all land cards and cards with bloom milled this way into your hand. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Ichor Grenade
card.text: You may discard a Tactic card rather than pay this spell's mana cost. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: This artifact deals 6 damage to target creature.

card.name: Amnesiac Test Subject
card.text: When this creature dies, put a zeal counter on target Faerie.

card.name: Living Truce
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, if you control a Human and a Faerie, this creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Artisinal Armonica
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}: Scry 1.

card.name: Ichorblade
Portentous Vista
card.text: When this land enters, sacrifice it. Choose a basic land type. Create a tapped basic land token with that type.

card.name: Temple of Enlightenment
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Temple of Deceit
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Temple of Malice
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Temple of Abandon
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Temple of Plenty
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Temple of Silence
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Temple of Epiphany
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Temple of Malady
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Temple of Triumph
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Temple of Mystery
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, scry 1. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Nimbus Maze
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W}. Activate only if you control an Island. {T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control a Plains.

card.name: Forbidding Glacier
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control a Swamp. {T}: Add {B}. Activate only if you control an Island.

card.name: Crooked Canyon
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {B}. Activate only if you control a Mountain. {T}: Add {R}. Activate only if you control a Swamp.

card.name: Autumnal Grove
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {R}. Activate only if you control a Forest. {T}: Add {G}. Activate only if you control a Mountain.

card.name: Picturesque Outcropping
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G}. Activate only if you control a Plains. {T}: Add {W}. Activate only if you control a Forest.

card.name: Salted Lakebed
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {W}. Activate only if you control a Swamp. {T}: Add {B}. Activate only if you control a Plains.

card.name: Ochre Basin
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control a Mountain. {T}: Add {R}. Activate only if you control an Island.

card.name: Miasmic Expanse
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {B}. Activate only if you control a Forest. {T}: Add {G}. Activate only if you control a Swamp.

card.name: Steep Snowfield
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {R}. Activate only if you control a Plains. {T}: Add {W}. Activate only if you control a Mountain.

card.name: Humid Verdure
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add {G}. Activate only if you control an Island. {T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control a Forest.

card.name: St. Ysolde
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature attacks, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.) Whenever you cast a Tactic spell, you may pay {1}. If you do, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: D'd'wid, Oathbound
card.text: When this creature enters, scry 1. You lose 1 life. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Edgeshine of a Knife
card.text: Menace Whenever an opponent loses life, create a Treasure token, then exile the top card of that player's library. If it's a nonland card, you may cast it this turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: November, Firestarter
card.text: Trample When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1{R}G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: This creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Put a zeal counter on up to one other target Faerie you control.

card.name: Vivian, Hopeful Pugilist
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Whenever one or more +1/+1 counters are put on another creature you control, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Captain Victoria
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you attack, up to one target attacking Human gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each Human you control. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Lace, Hired Glamermage
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever a you control with prowess deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Professor Shock
card.text: Deathtouch {1}{B}{G}, Sacrifice a Human and a Faerie: Draw two cards, then create a X/X colorless Construct artifact creature token, where X is the combined power of the sacrificed creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sergeant Coxley
card.text: First strike Whenever you attack with two or more creatures, create a 1/1 white Human creature token that's tapped and attacking.

card.name: Klein, First of the Blessed
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target card with bloom from your graveyard to your hand. {1}{G}{U}: Exile this creature, then return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control.

card.name: Assail
card.text: Destroy target creature if it's attacking or has power 4 or greater.

card.name: Bloomstained Recruiter
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a tapped 1/1 white Human creature token.

card.name: Ichorbronze Assistant
card.text: First strike, vigilance {1}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature with a +1/+1 counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Augmented Aerialist
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, strategize twice. (To strategize, put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Eleonora's Procession
card.text: Vigilance Other Humans you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Daring Acrobat
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, if its power was 4 or greater, return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: Mirrorsand Duelist
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, you may pay {1}{W}. If you do, other creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Supply Lines
card.text: When this enchantment enters, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.) Whenever you strategize, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Committed Company
card.text: Reveal the top nine cards of your library. Put up to three creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Orphans' Resilience
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if it targets a Human and {1} less to cast if it targets a Faerie. Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to three target creatures.

card.name: Fallowpeaks Banishment
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile up to one target creature until this enchantment leaves the battlefield. {1}{W}: Return this enchantment to its owner's hand. Strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Fleet's Symphony
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains prowess until end of turn. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Prowess stacks.)

card.name: Rigamaroll's Form
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +1/+0, gains hexproof, and cannot be blocked. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Fenley's Flagship
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Tactic card in your hand. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.) Flying Whenever you cast a Tactic spell, draw a card.

card.name: Eccentric Balloonist
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast a noncreature spell with mana value greater than this creature's power, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Jollity Impressionist
card.text: Prowess You may have this creature enter the battlefield as a copy of a creature you control, except it has prowess. (Prowess stacks.)

card.name: Upwelling Elemental
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, when you next cast a spell with bloom this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Squawking Omen
card.text: Create a 2/2 blue Illusion creature token with flying. Scry 2. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Blue Palace Interlocutor
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, each opponent mills two cards.

card.name: Time to Consider
card.text: Mill two cards, then return a card milled this way to your hand. Put a stun counter on up to one target tapped creature. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Weapons Program
card.text: Draw three cards, then strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.) You may cast a Tactic spell from your hand without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Panicked Evacuation
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've cast another spell this turn. Target nonland permanent's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library

card.name: Distillery Field Tester
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When this creature dies, draw cards equal to its power.

card.name: Condescend
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {X}. Scry 2.

card.name: Oathbound Labourers
card.text: This creature can't block. Whenever one or more Humans you control attack while this card is in your graveyard, you may pay {2}{B}. If you do, return this card to the battlefield tapped and attacking.

card.name: Massacre Vulture
card.text: Flying, deathtouch {B}, Exile a Human card and a Faerie card from your graveyard: Put two +1/+1 counters on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Rearguard Action
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of creatures. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each creature sacrificed this way. Destroy up to two target creatures.

card.name: Masked Agent
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost life this turn, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1}{B}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Hungry Bloomchild
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: D'd'wid's Contract
card.text: You lose life equal to the number of cards in your hand. Scry 2, then draw two cards.

card.name: Eruption Blightmonger
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1}{B}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Target opponent may discard a card. If they don't, you may return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Zugzwang
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, strategize if an opponent lost life this turn. Otherwise, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (To strategize, put the top card of your Tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Failed Sibling
card.text: When this creature enters, target player reveals their hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. If you do, exile that card and this creature. (An exiled Tactic card is shuffled into its owner's tactic deck.)

card.name: Ichor Extraction
card.text: Destroy target creature. Its controller creates a Treasure token.

card.name: Orchestrated Riot
card.text: Strategize twice, then this spell deals X damage to target creature and you gain X life, where X is the number of Tactic cards in your hand. (To strategize, put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Apothecary Physician
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Camp Clef Innovator
card.text: Prowess When this creature or another nontoken creature you control with prowess enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Gleeful Arsonist
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the total amount of life your opponents have lost this turn. Menace

card.name: Crucible Breaker
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {3}{R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Create a 4/4 red Elemental creature token with haste and prowess. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Lacrymose Blessed
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain menace until end of turn.

card.name: Eruption Strike Leader
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: It gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Were Hunt Enforcer
card.text: Trample, prowess. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Rioter's Mask
Annihilation Performance
card.text: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many cards. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Ichor Exposure
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/-2 and has trample and "Whenever this creature attacks, exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn."

card.name: Spread the Infection
card.text: This spell deals 2 damage to any target. If a creature dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Firebomb
card.text: This spell deals 2 damage to each creature.

card.name: Immolate
card.text: This spell deals X plus 1 damage to target creature.

card.name: Kudzu Elemental
card.text: Reach This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Studberg Regulars
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: This creature fights target creature you don't control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fallow Lands Nomad
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {1}{G}, {T}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Mill three cards, then return a card milled this way from your graveyard to your hand. {2}{G}{G}, {T}: Put a zeal counter on target Faerie.

card.name: Invasive Plowbeetle
card.text: When this creature enters, return a permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Picket Line Paladin
card.text: Vigilance, trample This creature gets +1/+0 for each Human you control.

card.name: Bloomtouched Toymaker
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever you cast a spell with bloom from your hand, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Mask Maker
card.text: When this creature enters, double the number of each type of counter on target creature. Creatures you control with counters on them have vigilance.

card.name: Fungimancer
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may exile three cards from your graveyard. When you do, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Create a 2/2 green Fungus creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Barkspace Conspiracy
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie you control. Whenever you remove a zeal counter from a creature you control, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Ask The Earth
card.text: Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature, where X is its power. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Flood of Moss
card.text: Choose a basic land type. Create a tapped basic land token with that type. You gain 2 life. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Miasmic Reclamation
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. If you control a Human and a Faerie, create a 2/2 green Fungus creature token.

card.name: Printing Press
card.text: {2}, {T}: Put a zeal counter on target Faerie you control.

card.name: FRPD Truncheon
Mobile Drillrig
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, this Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: St Gufilda's Memorial
card.text: When this artifact enters, create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. Whenever an attacking creature you control dies, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Bloomwild Haze
card.text: When this land enters, exile the top two cards of your library. This land has all basic land types of the exiled cards. {T}: Add {C} or one mana of any of the exiled cards' colors.

card.name: Studberg Estates
Fallowpeaks Prison
Foxtown Teahouse
Blue Palace Fountain
Undertree Foundry
Marlene, Tail for Business
card.text: Players play with the top card of their library revealed. During each player's turn, that player may cast spells from the tops of their opponents' libraries. Mana of any type may be spent to cast those spells. Spells you cast this way cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Hippocrat Melix
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. When this creature dies, you may exile target creature an opponent controls. If you do, return this creature to the battlefield under that player's control.

card.name: Myriad V
card.text: First strike Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {BR}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Target player loses 3 life unless they exile a card from their hand or a nonland permanent they control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ruby, Rebellion's Heart
card.text: Creatures you control enter the battlefield with an additional zeal counter on them. Creatures you control have all activated abilities of Faerie cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Aurora, Loving Healer
card.text: Flash, Defender When this creature enters, return all creature cards from your graveyard to the battlefield that were put there from the battlefield this turn. Put two +1/+1 counters on each of them.

card.name: Prince Wilhelm
card.text: When this creature enters, create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. Whenever you cast a Tactic spell, you may pay 2 life. If you do, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Fleet, Musical Skywright
card.text: Prowess Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, reveal the top ten cards of your library. Put an artifact card from among them onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Fenley, Oasis Gardener
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put an extraction counter on another target creature. Its controller creates a Treasure token. Each creature gets -1/-1 for each extraction counter on it.

card.name: Swell, Bloomtouched Scion
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, each player may choose a creature other than Swell, Bloomtouched Scion. This creature deals 3 damage to each creature chosen this way.

card.name: Rigamaroll, Masked Crab
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters under, this creature becomes a copy of that creature until the end of your next turn, except it's a 3/3 Crab named Rigamaroll, Masked Crab.

card.name: Song of the Void
card.text: Enchant creature you control Enchanted creature has ward {1}. When this enchantment enters, exile target creature until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Maviella Margave
card.text: When this creature enters, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a Human card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Human spells you cast cost {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} less to cast. This effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay.

card.name: Crack Pilot
card.text: Vehicle creatures and equipped creatures you control get +1/+1 and have "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it" (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Caesura Technique
card.text: You can't untap more than one land during your untap step. At the beginning of your upkeep, draw a card. Whenever an opponent casts a spell, untap up to one target land.

card.name: Decorated Tactician
card.text: Prowess, first strike When this creature enters, strategize. {X}{W}, Tap X untapped creatures you control, discard a Tactic card: Copy the discarded card X times. You may cast the copies without paying their mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Emaciate
card.text: All creatures have base power and toughness 0/0 until end of turn.

card.name: The Sceptre
card.text: Crew 1 Whenever this Vehicle attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Whenever a creature crews this Vehicle alone, sacrifice it.

card.name: The Crown of Glass
card.text: Equip {U} Equipped creature has prowess. (Prowess stacks.) Whenever equipped creature attacks, exile the top card of your library face down. (You can't look at it) {2}, Sacrifice this Equipment: Put all cards exiled with it into their owners' hands.

card.name: Chisel, Heterodox Luthier
card.text: Flash, prowess. When this creature enters, gain control of target spell with mana value X or less. You may choose new targets for it.

card.name: Erode Fate
card.text: Target player mills eleven cards. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Lenora's Glamer
card.text: Whenever you cast a Tactic spell, you may pay {1}. If you do, create a 2/2 blue Illusion creature token with flying.

card.name: Resurface
card.text: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under your control. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Nurse-Current Augur
card.text: Flying Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each face-up exiled card you own in exile with bloom.

card.name: Production Line
card.text: {T}: Exile all Construct tokens you control, then create an X/X colorless Construct artifact creature token, where X is the number of spells you have cast this turn.

card.name: Clivinius the Scourge
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, destroy eight other target creatures.

card.name: Pro Bono Oathmage
card.text: When this creature enters, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {5}{B}{B}{B}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Gain control of target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Underworld Seer
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you scry, exile the bottom card of your library. You lose life equal to its mana value. If it's a nonland card, put it in your hand.

card.name: Broken Tower Nihilist
card.text: Deathtouch At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice a Faerie. If you do, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on each Human you control.

card.name: Chessmaster
card.text: Whenever a player casts their second spell each turn, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: Victory Drive
card.text: Create X 1/1 white Human creature tokens, where X is the total amount of life your opponents have lost this turn.

card.name: Ysolde's Gauntlet
Mobius, Progeny Mender
card.text: Discard a card: Put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {1}{R}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Ephemeral Deluge
card.text: Cascade (When you cast this spell, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card that costs less. You may cast it without paying its mana cost. Put the exiled cards on the bottom in a random order.) Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Flame-Touched Faerie
card.text: Haste {1}{R}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: This card deals 3 damage to each creature. Activate only as a sorcery and only if an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: Revolutionary Spirit
card.text: Whenever you remove one or more zeal counters from a creature to pay the cost of an ability, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Annihilation Junkie
card.text: Prowess At the beginning of combat on your turn, if this creature's power is 4 or greater, create a 4/4 red Elemental creature token with haste and prowess. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Infection Vessel
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature with no +1/+1 counters on it. Creatures with +1/+1 counters on them can't block.

card.name: Phantasia IV
card.text: Flying, Crew 1. Crew only once each turn. Whenever this Vehicle deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token, then you may sacrifice this Vehicle. If you do, exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the total power of creatures that crewed this Vehicle this turn. You may play those cards this turn.

card.name: Demerara, Silken Host
card.text: Reach, Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Each other creature you control enters the battlefield with a number of additional +1/+1 counters on it equal to this creature's toughness.

card.name: Seed of the Mega Tree
card.text: When this artifact enters and whenever you cast a spell with bloom from your hand, create a Forest token. {8}{G}{G}: This artifact becomes a creature with vigilance, reach, and "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control."

card.name: Margrave's Desolation
card.text: Destroy target noncreature permanent. Create two 2/2 green Fungus creature tokens, then put a +1/+1 counter on each Fungus you control. Bloom (If you cast this from your hand, exile it as it resolves. When you cast a spell with greater mana value, you may cast this from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Crab Caucus Patissier
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Then draw a card if this creature's power is 4 or greater.

card.name: Beast-Age Chronicler
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {2}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: You may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: People in Arms
card.text: This creature enters tapped with five stun counters on it. Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Untap target creature.

card.name: Emerald Dam Invocation
card.text: Mill fifteen cards. Return a permanent card milled this way to your hand. Put this spell and up to four cards from its owner's graveyard on the bottom of their owner's library in a random order.

card.name: Panharmonicon
card.text: If an artifact or creature entering the battlefield causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Gray Hand Beachhead
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Strategize. Activate only if you attacked with a Human this turn. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.)

card.name: The Lotus of Margrave
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw two cards. {T}: Add three mana of any one color. At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player gains control of this artifact. Untap it.

card.name: The Summer Palace
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {1}{G}{G}, Discard this card: Creatures you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Catrest
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. {2}{R}{R}, Discard this card: Create two tapped 1/1 red Cat creature tokens with prowess.

card.name: Mulberry Hall
card.text: {T}: Add {W}. {2}{W}{W}, Discard this card: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature.

card.name: Fenley's Garden
card.text: {T}: Add {B}. {1}{B}{B}, Sacrifice a creature, discard this card: Create a Treasure token, then draw two cards.

card.name: Camp Clef
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. {2}{U}{U}, Discard this card: Reveal the top six cards of your library. Put all noncreature, nonland cards revealed this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Industrial Revolution
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create two Treasure tokens. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, if mana from a Treasure was spent to cast it, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Unbounded Feeder
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may pay 2 life. If you do, put an infection counter on this artifact. If you don't, destroy all nonland permanents, then create a 2/2 green Fungus creature token for each infection counter on this artifact.

card.name: Endless Struggle
card.text: Whenever a nontoken Human or Faerie you control dies, return it to the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead)

card.name: Verity System
card.text: Enchant player Whenever a player casts their second spell each turn, put all cards exiled with this Aura into their owner's graveyard, then exile the top three cards of enchanted player's library. Enchanted player can't cast spells with the same mana value as a card exiled with this Aura.

card.name: Heart of the Bloom
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile a white card, a blue card, a black card, a red card, and a green card you own from outside the game. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, choose one of the exiled cards at random. You may cast it without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Company Exemplar
card.text: Vigilance At the beginning of your upkeep, strategize. (Put the top card of your tactic deck into your hand.) Discard five Tactic cards: Create twenty 1/1 white Human creature tokens.

card.name: State of Peace
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 red Cat creature token with prowess. You gain 3 life. {2}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Reveal a white card you own from outside the game and put it in your hand.

card.name: Apothecary Exemplar
card.text: Flying Other Horror creatures you control have flying. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to an opponent, that player mills that many cards. You may return a creature card milled this way to the battlefield under your control. It's a Horror in addition to its other types.

card.name: State of Sadness
card.text: When this enchantment enters, scry 2, then draw a card. {2}{U}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Reveal a blue card you own from outside the game and put it in your hand.

card.name: Were Hunt Exemplar
card.text: Menace {B}{B}, Sacrifice another creature with mana value X: Draw X cards. {B}{B}, Discard X cards: Return target creature with mana value X from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: State of Fear
card.text: When this enchantment enters, look at target opponent's hand. Choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card. {2}{B}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Reveal a black card you own from outside the game and put it in your hand.

card.name: Eruption Exemplar
card.text: As long is it's your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever you attack, exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield tapped and attacking under your control. Its owner gains control of it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: State of Anger
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it deals 3 damage to target creature. {2}{R}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Reveal a red card you own from outside the game and put it in your hand.

card.name: Ultimatum Exemplar
card.text: Trample At the beginning of your end step, put a zeal counter on target Faerie. {X}{G}, Remove a zeal counter from this creature: Reveal the top X cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: State of Joy
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may return a land you control to its owner's hand. If you do, choose a basic land type. Create a basic land token with that type. {2}{G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Reveal a green card you own from outside the game and put it in your hand.

card.name: Cat PRU
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Illusion PRU
card.text: Flying

card.name: Treasure PRU
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Treasure: Add a mana of any color.

card.name: Elemental PRU
card.text: Haste, Prowess

card.name: In The Bloom PRU
card.text: After a Bloom spell you cast from your hand resolves, you can place the exiled card here. Whenever you cast a spell with greater mana value than the exiled card, you may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost
